phases.A_MONITOR_SWEEP: wait for current pipeline sweep to finish or stall+respawn; transition when status=done & all metas fresh
phases.A_DONE: write completion summary; transition to B1
phases.B1_SNAPSHOT_EXISTING: dump current pipeline-card + cluster-card HTML/JS hooks to a markdown reference; transition to B2
phases.B2_REFACTOR_PIPELINE: rewrite pipeline_orchestrator.train_all to submit cluster tasks instead of in-process trainer calls; transition to B3
phases.B3_MASTER_SELF_REGISTER: make master register itself as cluster node 'LOCAL_RAZER'; transition to B4
phases.B4_UNIFIED_CARD_HTML: build new TRAINING & BACKTEST card HTML+CSS replacing both legacy cards; transition to B5
phases.B5_UNIFIED_CARD_JS: wire JS — fleet table, task list, sweep button, progress bar; transition to B6
phases.B6_DELETE_LEGACY: remove old Training Cluster + Pipeline Orchestrator card HTML; transition to B7
phases.B7_TESTS: Phase 80 regression test (~25 assertions); transition to C1
phases.C1_SWEEP_COORDINATOR: write SweepCoordinator class for serial-model + parallel-within-model flow; transition to C2
phases.C2_OPERATOR_CONTROLS: add UI controls: model order, skip checkbox, parallelism cap, pause-after-model; transition to D
phases.D_KICKOFF: trigger first full Phase-D sweep with strict all×all + 20 symbols + auto-continue; transition to D_MONITOR
phases.D_MONITOR: ongoing — monitor the new flow with the existing 30-min loop; report progress per model completion
phases.DONE: all phases complete; report and exit loop
